title: Exploria
body:
[![Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Exploria/BH_EX_HEADER.webp)](https://pixeldreamstudios.net)

[**![Promo](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Exploria/BH_EX_PROMO.webp)**](https://bisecthosting.com/PixelDream)

![About](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Exploria/BH_EX_BANNER1.webp)

This modpack is based on **New in Town | The Settler's Experience Data Pack** by kanokarob, an extensive data pack in which the player is in charge of building up their settlement and defending their outpost against the forces of the Nether.

In this modpack, our goal was to create an **exciting adventure** for players. It features around **200 carefully picked mods** that greatly enhance the gameplay. The modpack has been optimized for performance, ensuring a **smooth and uninterrupted experience**.

Step into the immersive world of **Exploria** where you can **build a thriving town** in the Overworld, **create a stronghold** in the dangerous Nether, and **establish a majestic city** in the End. But before you can undertake these ambitious projects, you must defeat the **evil tyrant** who has invaded your humble abode.

As you construct impressive structures, you will unlock **valuable rewards** that will help you overcome **challenging bosses** and obtain coveted artifacts through meticulous crafting. The end dimension has been revamped with **Stellarity**, and the difficulty has been raised with **Extravanilla's hard mode**, making your journey even more thrilling.

Embark on this **exhilarating adventure** and indulge in the endless opportunities for exploration and enjoyment that **Exploria** has to offer.

## READ BEFORE PLAYING
Due to FTBQuests not being on Modrinth, you will need to download these mods and manually add them to the modpack to get the full experience! 
[FTB Quests](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-quests-fabric/files/4929478) | [FTBTeams](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-teams-fabric/files/4623115) | [FTB Xmod Compat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-xmod-compat/files/4932156) | [FTB Library](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-library-fabric/files/4864328) | [Item Filters](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/item-filters/files/4838265)
